name: Steve Chabot
subject: Here Come the Democrat Debates – Aaaaah!
body:
Here Come the Democrat Debates - Aaaaah! No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jidukdjy-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidukdjy-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidukdjy-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Here Come the Democrat Debates - Aaaaah!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidukdjy-kujkulhluu-j/)
Tonight and tomorrow night 20 Democrats are going to be debating each other. Each thinks he or she ought to be the next president of the United States. I'm on the blog talking about what we can expect.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidukdjy-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidukdjy-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Hidin' Joe Biden](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidukdjy-kujkulhluu-d/)
Joe Biden is clearly the frontrunner at this time to win the Democratic nomination for president. He's way ahead in virtually all the polls. But where exactly IS Joe Biden?

Click the link below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidukdjy-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidukdjy-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Faux Impeachment](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidukdjy-kujkulhluu-u/)
The Democrats in Congress have a big problem. Their base, the people who are hardcore Democrats, and vote Democrat every election come hell or highwater, hate Donald Trump, and want him impeached. Most of the rest of America, meaning virtually all Republicans, and the majority of independents, are sick of talking about it, and think it's a big waste of time and money. So what are Democrats to do?

Click the link below to read this week's blog about it. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidukdjy-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidukdjy-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Why China MUST Be Defeated](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jidukdjy-kujkulhluu-n/)
I read a column by Dick Morris over the weekend which I have to say was one of the most insightful and best written I've read in a long time. In my blog this week I'm going to sum up his key points for you

Click the link below to read more. name: Jennifer Fiore
subject: debate tonight -- what to expect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9a/3eb3e2fc/4387ecd4/744af25f/3822875793/VEsH/ "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20190626_em_debate-general&source=20190626_em_debate-general")
---
| | Tonight's first Democratic Primary debate is a big milestone and we couldn't be more excited to get started. Because you've been a supporter from the beginning, I want to make sure that you have a sneak peek into what we expect to hear from Secretary Castro tonight. Watch tonight, and join the conversation on Twitter, Facebook and Instagram using #Castro2020 and #DemDebate. Secretary Castro will tell his story tonight. His American Dream story. His story of not only developing but also implementing plans to improve our nation. His story of being the leader we need in this moment to defeat Donald Trump. The grandson of a Mexican immigrant raised by a single mother on San Antonio's west side, Secretary Castro has struggled and succeeded, becoming living proof of the American Dream. As a former mayor and member of President Obama's cabinet, he has not only crafted sweeping policies like those he's introduced on the campaign trail, but also seen them to fruition. These qualities are what we know can defeat Donald Trump in 2020. With 20 million people expected to tune in to NBC, MSNBC and Telemundo tonight at 9:00 PM ET, it's an opportunity to introduce a whole lot of people to the candidate who has led the field on some of the most important issues of this era.
Thank you for standing with Secretary Castro. We'll be watching Twitter #Castro2020 for your messages of support and encouragement and retweeting the best ones, so bring your A-game!
Onward, Jenn Fiore
Senior Advisor for Communications and Digital [DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9a/3eb3e2fc/4387ecd4/744af25e/3822875793/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcgen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190626_em_debate-general&source=20190626_em_debate-general")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9a/3eb3e2fc/4387ecd4/744af25d/3822875793/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20190626_em_debate-general&source=20190626_em_debate-general")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9a/3eb3e2fc/4387ecd4/744af25c/3822875793/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20190626_em_debate-general&source=20190626_em_debate-general")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9a/3eb3e2fc/4387ecd4/744af25b/3822875793/VEsD/ "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20190626_em_debate-general&source=20190626_em_debate-general")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9a/3eb3e2fc/4387ecd4/744af25a/3822875793/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190626_em_debate-general&source=20190626_em_debate-general")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9a/3eb3e2fc/4387ecd4/744af259/3822875793/VEsB/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20190626_em_debate-general&source=20190626_em_debate-general"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9a/3eb3e2fc/4387ecd4/744af258/3822875793/VEsO/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20190626_em_debate-general&source=20190626_em_debate-general"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Suddenly, Democrats say there is a border crisis
body:
On February 15, President Donald J. Trump declared a national emergency to address the security and humanitarian crisis on our southern border. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=caf517c887&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 26, 2019
---
| | |
# **Suddenly, Democrats say there is a border crisis**

**On February 15,** President Donald J. Trump declared a national emergency to address the security and humanitarian crisis on our southern border. That month, more than 40,000 alien families arrived—an unprecedented surge that America’s outdated and overstretched immigration system is ill-equipped to handle.

**Something to share:**[26 times they called the border crisis fake news](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ac6a66e6f&e=3ee4985eea)

**Congressional Democrats** were swift and nearly unanimous in their response, as _Washington Examiner_ columnist Byron York detailed today:
* “A fake crisis at the border,” House Speaker Nancy Pelosi proclaimed.

* “A crisis that does not exist,” Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer said.

* “There is no crisis at the border,” House Majority Leader Steny Hoyer declared.

**The media** was quick to endorse that narrative. _Morning Joe_ deemed the emergency “an imaginary border crisis.” _The Washington Post_ editorial board called it “make-believe.” _The New York Times_ “fact-checked” the President’s claim of a border crisis and reported it false—before [contradicting themselves two paragraphs later](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2255a2b4c8&e=3ee4985eea).

**How times change. “** This nation is facing a humanitarian crisis at the southern border,” House Democrats tweeted today. Don’t mistake that for an admission of fault. They make clear the problem isn’t Congress’ years of refusal to fix America’s broken immigration system. Their culprit is U.S. law enforcement, whose officers are guilty of running “concentration camps” for illegal immigrants, as one freshman Congresswoman put it.

**President Trump** has requested $4.5 billion in emergency aid—$3.3 billion of it marked for humanitarian assistance—to help law enforcement address the historic surge in large migrant groups arriving at our southern border. Congress has yet to pass it.

**Just as crucial** , the only long-term solution to this humanitarian crisis is for Congress to close the catch-and-release loopholes that fuel child smuggling into the United States. As long as children can be used to evade our laws, they'll continue to be put in danger.

**So far** , Democrats have resisted every single effort to shut off the magnets for child smuggling. “Fixing the laws would solve everything,” President Trump said today. “And they could do it so quickly. It’s so simple,” he added.

**“They know** what to do. They just don’t want to do it.”

[Watch: President Trump says “Democrats are solely responsible” for this crisis.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d03030cbac&e=3ee4985eea)

**More** : [Top 5 border falsehoods pushed by Congressional Democrats and the media](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3b667848b0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump is on his way to Japan**

**President Trump** took off this afternoon for his second visit to Japan in less than a month—this time to take part in the 2019 G20 Summit in Osaka.

**The G20** is an opportunity for world leaders to discuss the biggest challenges facing our global economy. President Trump’s goal this week, as always, is to fight for the best deals and outcomes possible to lift up America’s workers.

**🎬****Watch:**[President Trump is wheels up for Osaka, Japan](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=30d1044325&e=3ee4985eea)

**A truly** **level playing field** means breaking down foreign barriers—both the tariff and non-tariff kind—that have stifled America’s economy and taken away too many jobs. Unlike his predecessors, President Trump is willing to use every tool at his disposal to bring these countries to the negotiating table and agree to better terms for our citizens.

**“We are a country** that's respected again,” the President said before boarding Marine One this afternoon.
---
|
---
|
## **Jared Kushner on a pathway to peace in the Middle East**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=042a8ee95a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **In Bahrain this week** , senior Trump Administration officials took part in a two-day summit that unveiled a new economic roadmap for the Palestinian people.

**“The overall consensus** is that [Peace to Prosperity] is a very executable plan,” Senior Advisor to the President Jared Kushner said of the response from representatives of more than 20 participating countries. “There is so much thirst and excitement about investing in the West Bank and Gaza.”

[See President Trump’s economic vision for the Palestinian people.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=618b406685&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
| **President Donald J. Trump talks to reporters on the South Lawn of the White House prior to boarding Marine One to begin his trip to Japan** | June 26, 2019
---
|

The media was quick to endorse that narrative. Morning Joe deemed the emergency “an imaginary border crisis.” The Washington Post editorial board called it “make-believe.” The New York Times “fact-checked” the President’s claim of a border crisis and reported it false—before . How times change. “ This nation is facing a humanitarian crisis at the southern border,” House Democrats tweeted today. Don’t mistake that for an admission of fault. They make clear the problem isn’t Congress’ years of refusal to fix America’s broken immigration system. Their culprit is U.S. law enforcement, whose officers are guilty of running “concentration camps” for illegal immigrants, as one freshman Congresswoman put it. President Trump has requested $4.5 billion in emergency aid—$3.3 billion of it marked for humanitarian assistance—to help law enforcement address the historic surge in large migrant groups arriving at our southern border. Congress has yet to pass it. Just as crucial , the only long-term solution to this humanitarian crisis is for Congress to close the catch-and-release loopholes that fuel child smuggling into the United States. As long as children can be used to evade our laws, they'll continue to be put in danger. So far , Democrats have resisted every single effort to shut off the magnets for child smuggling. “Fixing the laws would solve everything,” President Trump said today. “And they could do it so quickly. It’s so simple,” he added. “They know what to do. They just don’t want to do it.” More : | | President Trump is on his way to Japan President Trump took off this afternoon for his second visit to Japan in less than a month—this time to take part in the 2019 G20 Summit in Osaka. The G20 is an opportunity for world leaders to discuss the biggest challenges facing our global economy. President Trump’s goal this week, as always, is to fight for the best deals and outcomes possible to lift up America’s workers. 🎬**Watch: A truly level playing field means breaking down foreign barriers—both the tariff and non-tariff kind—that have stifled America’s economy and taken away too many jobs. Unlike his predecessors, President Trump is willing to use every tool at his disposal to bring these countries to the negotiating table and agree to better terms for our citizens. “We are a country that's respected again,” the President said before boarding Marine One this afternoon. | | Jared Kushner on a pathway to peace in the Middle East | | In Bahrain this week , senior Trump Administration officials took part in a two-day summit that unveiled a new economic roadmap for the Palestinian people. “The overall consensus is that [Peace to Prosperity] is a very executable plan,” Senior Advisor to the President Jared Kushner said of the response from representatives of more than 20 participating countries. “There is so much thirst and excitement about investing in the West Bank and Gaza.” | | Photo of the Day | Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian | President Donald J. Trump talks to reporters on the South Lawn of the White House prior to boarding Marine One to begin his trip to Japan | June 26, 2019 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

_Over these few short months, whether it’s protecting our borders and curbing illegal immigration, working to create jobs and grow our economy, or providing for our fighting men and women, I have given every ounce of effort possible to deliver on our shared conservative Hoosier priorities._ [ **Donate now, your impact is DOUBLED** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=c571ffa5f090450fa9cc9d8fbce02a3d&_e=rsPJ2SkprBHlJCdDI5rqCZlTXMMEy48d00j08SZHuNSKEnin7b2IDexCekkH1J0UE8e3MafgEbiiIDoAf5UhNrWXnXZPgzl0hY3sBiMlNVpiTaqTnCmhr5h_6pUP2de2ZygwhwN6yX_wBHaHTW5V3iyDo4vvm16kTwVwSYj_WeT5wmdh7PSlu5a4u7_VkKE1TsPHGjaXBUPGS9PGdFNqFdYSzpEhBwptoagJQ66kBGjJuBUB5ppJLozmJa2PXiY3_PgFnftF-PEcQXjvRh32QdIoKRUHAtl5blORpNbS1cPMB35zcS0kJw4aAdaY6FNV0GGA-gwO-W-2aX1scyNX8ol5TmEOkyHOK6g_x4KWkBJ3DaJfpMDZdq5ms2PPmSLKXRb_P9Urn2WbfttR6BglN3YymVZ0LHc0y9bDmXslNro%3D) **I’m a Marine, and I have treated my service on behalf of the Sixth District just as seriously as my military service. It’s been about serving you – not serving special interests, like it is for most politicians.**
But that means those special interests have been gunning for me since Day 1. They want nothing more than to defeat me and install a politician who will serve them instead of you.
We all know that’s not going to happen – but we need to step up right now, together, to prevent it.
**The end of this month is a critically important turning point for our campaign. 11:59pm on June 30th is an official Federal Election Commission Quarterly Fundraising Deadline. After that, we are required by law to publicly report our fundraising numbers.**
Special interests will be watching us closely, and if we have a poor showing, they will take that as a signal that it is time to attack me in hopes their smears will lead to my defeat in 2020.
**[Thankfully, a group of generous conservative Hoosier donors has stepped up in a big way to help us fight – they have agreed to DOUBLE every single donation you make between now and June 30th at 11:59pm. Can you help? Donate any amount now and your donation will be DOUBLED.](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=c571ffa5f090450fa9cc9d8fbce02a3d&_e=rsPJ2SkprBHlJCdDI5rqCZlTXMMEy48d00j08SZHuNSKEnin7b2IDexCekkH1J0UE8e3MafgEbiiIDoAf5UhNrWXnXZPgzl0hY3sBiMlNVpiTaqTnCmhr5h_6pUP2de2ZygwhwN6yX_wBHaHTW5V3iyDo4vvm16kTwVwSYj_WeT5wmdh7PSlu5a4u7_VkKE1TsPHGjaXBUPGS9PGdFNqFVXcNgEUcGK6R3cbEo-qBK-S0ZLQZHdBeNuOlfJQRwJpN7UDqhR8a949TmvdIUrADr-u4CeIiyP89XLiKljU2FHftXBdRoButW18s1pVRiCKsc7XCVH2nkrykvRg23AQUDFiY7Duj_JN6sTkOAZ6u1wNFEySRTVUwJMzRwXSL612eD88z5BGTwfdtFNuC5dPsWbx-01h46TSprc7cc7XeM4%3D)** | |

Let's head out with my favorite Springsteen quote -- "The future is now. Roll up your sleeves and let your passion flow. The country we carry in our hearts is waiting..."

Wish me luck!

Tim

body:

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Grateful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
The only way we can win -- the only way we can make Washington work for everyone, not just a thinner and thinner slice at the top -- is to build a grassroots movement that's ready to fight for it... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e3be/45c30650/17b8345af/669ac0fe/1729318188/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
**I 'm deeply grateful for everything you do as a member of this grassroots team.**

I'm ready to fight my heart out for the big, structural change we need to reshape our economy, our government, and our democracy.

But the only way we can win -- the only way we can make Washington work for everyone, not just a thinner and thinner slice at the top -- is to build a grassroots movement that's ready to fight for it alongside me.

**It 's powerfully important that we hit our fundraising goal before Sunday's FEC reporting deadline. So I'm asking you: Can you make your first contribution right now?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically processed:_

name: Cory Booker
subject: I just walked off stage, and I have to ask you this directly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, a lot of people want you to believe the worst about our country's future. Tonight, you saw why I refuse to be cynical about what we can accomplish together. If you think I belong on the debate stage, then I need to ask directly: _**[People like you are the only chance I have at qualifying for the fall debates -- will you make a donation right now?](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190626-em5?refcode=em_fr_20190626_CB_20190626-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_2020ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ Thank you for taking a chance on me -- I can promise you it's something I'll never forget. Cory
[](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190626-em5?refcode=em_fr_20190626_CB_20190626-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09a4/5fca0d19/9a4c628/291bf8ca/3608013951/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09a4/5fca0d19/9a4c628/291bf8c9/3608013951/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09a4/5fca0d19/9a4c628/291bf8c8/3608013951/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09a4/5fca0d19/9a4c628/291bf8d7/3608013951/VEsP/ "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: I just stepped off the stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I just stepped off the debate stage. [_**I spent every second up there fighting for you. Now, I 'm asking you to fight with me. Your $15 has never been more important than it is in this critical moment. Can I count on you? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9b/3eb3e2fc/43b1f188/744af2f3/3036750609/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20160626_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") Not only did we stand up for our winning vision tonight. We proved that even someone who comes from an immigrant family like I do... Who was raised by a single mother like I was... Who struggled to overcome adversity like I did... Can become President, too. **I need a massive showing of support in these next 24 hours to show the strength of this movement and prove that we 're in this for the long haul.** I left it all out on the stage tonight. If I made you proud, your $15 would mean so much to me in this moment. | | [**Chip in $15 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9b/3eb3e2fc/43b1f188/744af2f2/3036750609/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20160626_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=15")

| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9b/3eb3e2fc/43b1f188/744af2fd/3036750609/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/")

| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9b/3eb3e2fc/43b1f188/744af2fc/3036750609/VEsP/ "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9b/3eb3e2fc/43b1f188/744af2fb/3036750609/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9b/3eb3e2fc/43b1f188/744af2fa/3036750609/VEsHBA/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9b/3eb3e2fc/43b1f188/744af2f9/3036750609/VEsHBw/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage. Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: My thoughts on tonight's debate: Experience matters.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Friend, tomorrow night is the first Democratic debate of this presidential primary. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771795/691c9bd/6db6ff05/11a4253c/164867569/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend--I promised you I'd be in touch with my response to the first Democratic debate.

I have the utmost respect for my colleagues and fellow competitors in this race, and I saw lots of great ideas on stage: for immigration reform, for gun violence prevention, and for mitigating climate change.

But what matters isn't just ideas, it's getting things done. Experience matters--a track record matters. Progress cannot be conjured out of thin air. It takes time and it takes work.

Before I go onstage for my own debate tomorrow, my team will show me the list of everyone who's stepped up in the last week to become a Debate Donor--everyone willing to go on the record with their belief in this campaign and in what we can actually accomplish _if_ we work together.

**[Friend, I hope I'll see your name on that list--and if you've already given (thank you!), I hope you'll consider chipping in again to get us closer to our goal by tomorrow night.](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190626_JH_20190626-fr-JH-firstdebate-all_all_l1&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you,
John ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190626_JH_20190626-fr-JH-firstdebate-all_all_contribbutton2&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******

name: Tim Ryan
subject: we did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Team -- What an electric night! This debate was the first time I've had a chance to share my vision and values with millions of Americans -- and go head to head with my Democratic friends and colleagues -- I can still feel the energy!

**I believe we need to start playing offense by addressing the root of our problems - be it the high cost of health care and lack of investment in quality foods, the lack of good paying jobs thanks to outsourcing and corporate greed or the failure of our leaders to ensure equal opportunities for all Americans -- be them black, white, brown, gay, straight or working people.**

[_**If you like what you heard, can you contribute just $3 now so we can keep up our momentum?**_](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-june-fec?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190626_4_4_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+If+you+like+what+you+heard+can+you+contr&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190626_4_4_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190626_4_4_T1")

I hope you believe in my vision and you go to bed tonight as hopeful and optimistic as I am about our future.

I know it's been a long time since many of us have felt optimistic but I truly believe our best is yet to come.

I'm more confident than I've ever been that we can turn this country around and build towards a better future for all our families -- with the right leadership in the White House in 2020.

[_**If you agree, and you 'd like to see this campaign take the next step, can you chip in RIGHT THIS MINUTE towards our Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline on Sunday?**_](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-june-fec?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190626_4_4_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+If+you+agree+and+yoursquod+like+to+see+t&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190626_4_4_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190626_4_4_T1")

This is the biggest financial deadline of the campaign to date -- even bigger than the hurdle we had to get over to qualify for tonight's debate.

We have to show that we are building grassroots momentum every single day.

[_**Are you with me?**_](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-june-fec?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190626_4_4_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Are+you+with+me&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190626_4_4_T1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190626_4_4_T1")

Tim

name: =?utf-8?q?Jen_O=E2=80=99Malley_Dillon=2C_Beto_for_America?=
subject: Tonight's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Beto showed us exactly the kind of leadership and vision we need to see matched up against Trump in 2020.
#
The first debate just ended. Beto showed us exactly the kind of leadership and vision we need to see matched up against Trump in 2020.
Now, we turn our focus to our big FEC fundraising deadline coming up on Sunday. We’re still short on our $600,000 goal, but tonight we can change that.
[Can you add a $3 contribution to help us reach our goal? Every donation adds up, building and building on our momentum as we head into the most critical time of our campaign.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17982?refcode=ema20190626-38982&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=38982%2E444211%2EckTzbh)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17982?refcode=ema20190626-38982&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=38982%2E444211%2EckTzbh)**
Tonight, Beto called for a new kind of politics. The people are taking power. We are going to be fearless about saying what’s right, and relentless about fighting for progress. It all starts with electing a president whose campaign is funded by and accountable to the grassroots. No PACs, no corporations, no special interests. That’s why your donations are such a key component.
I’m so proud to be building this with you.
Jen O’Malley Dillon
Campaign Manager
Beto for America

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=38982%2E444211%2EckTzbh). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

Friend,

The 2020 Democrats are losing it. They've spent over TWO YEARS trying to tear down me and my administration, only to fail. **RIDICULOUS.**

Corrupt SOCIALISTS like Sleepy Joe, Crazy Bernie and Pocahontas know they can't win. They heard we raised a **RECORD BREAKING $24.8 MILLION** on the day of my Second Term Presidential Run announcement and now they're panicking.

I want to keep this momentum going, Friend. Let's do something so HUGE and so INCREDIBLE, they won't be able to ignore how strong our movement is.

name: Margaret Preston Kulkarni
subject: My son needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Hi, my name is Margaret Preston Kulkarni. I'm Sri Preston Kulkarni's mom. You may have seen me last year on the campaign trail with him. If you had come by the office, you would have seen other moms working late, like Barbara, whose son David was managing the campaign. You would have seen uncles and aunties and grandparents helping to make phone calls in all the languages of the campaign. You would have seen the children of volunteers coming in to intern, and whole families going out to knock on doors together. You would have seen what a family-oriented campaign looks like.

When I see stories of this Administration taking children away from their parents, locking them up in small spaces without soap or toothbrushes or blankets, where they get lice infections, it turns my stomach. When I read about women continuing to die in childbirth while we argue about access to women's health, it breaks my heart. And when sons and daughters worry about their parents' Social Security or Medicare being cut, it worries me too.

My father and all his brothers served in WWII. My brother served in Vietnam. My son served as a Foreign Service Officer in Iraq. The America that they served and that we all love, protects families. The America my son is fighting for believes in real family values, including taking care of our children and our parents.

I'm asking you, if you care about real family values, please help send a message by sending my son to Congress.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9DP3o9apuIx_4i6XLNuhSsnKf_izwlGk0nh2_xa6qOA=/IR-06Az20vi5MaMfIyd5EHqkVcDksmczQUQFGZooai4=?refcode=0627email)

Thank you,

Margaret Preston Kulkarni

**STAY TUNED WITH OUR MOVEMENT!**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9DP3o9apuIx_4i6XLNuhSsnKf_izwlGk0nh2_xa6qOA=/tnrHro8iIjW2GnGXVma7uOnndxLzpgjGHrYqfpiRLSU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9DP3o9apuIx_4i6XLNuhSsnKf_izwlGk0nh2_xa6qOA=/nPf-VVa8_AVZ4tEPBp-YBcZHyvmA5B0ymCok3IpQW1o=)

* * *

Paid for by Sri for Congress.
---
Sri for Congress
PO Box 898
Sugarland TX 77478 United States

name: Cory Booker
subject: Reflecting on last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:

---
| Friend, It's a great feeling to wake up after a debate night like last night. I'm so proud of what we've accomplished, and I'm so grateful for people like you who helped get me to that stage. Where we go from here is up to this grassroots team. Our campaign's challenge right now is reaching 130,000 donors to qualify for a spot in the rest of the debates. **And if you 're willing to help out, you might be getting a thank you call from me.** I'm going to be calling (FaceTiming, Google Hangout-ing, and so on!) a few people who chip in from now until Sunday night -- **[please make a donation today to help secure my spot in future debates.](https://act.corybooker. name: Tim Kaine
subject: Iran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek:

I wanted to send you an update about what's happening with our President and Iran, and to ask for your support:

**Right now, I worry that President Trump is about to wage a dangerous war on his own, with no Congressional oversight.**

The fact is, Trump had a diplomatic deal that was working to stop Iran's nuclear program. Our allies said it was working. His own advisors even told him it was working. He scrapped it. And now he is close to blundering us into a war with Iran. _Why make that choice?_

**After two wars in the Middle East, the last thing we need is for our President to cheer and bluster and tweet us directly into a third one.** [**We need diplomacy, not war.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f177d/3e0906/7b4ad186/3e3087a7/73205800/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-tims-petition?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+We+need+diplomacy+not+war&utm_campaign=20190627_1_PET_TK_Iran&source=20190627_1_PET_TK_Iran")

Last week, I introduced an amendment to our national defense bill with Senator Tom Udall to stop Trump from going to war with Iran without Congressional approval. The amendment would prohibit funds being spent on a war with Iran unless Congress authorizes it. _Why? Because that's what is required by the Constitution._ It's deeply frightening to me that a President who took an oath to uphold that document doesn't get this. So now it's on Congress to put a guardrail up against him, and my Democratic colleagues and I can't do it alone. [**Will you add your name to my petition to tell Republican leadership in the Senate to follow their Constitutional obligations and stand up to President Trump?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f177d/3e0906/7b4ad186/3e3087a6/73205800/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-tims-petition?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+add+your+name+to+my+petition+to&utm_campaign=20190627_1_PET_TK_Iran&source=20190627_1_PET_TK_Iran")

The other enormously concerning aspect of President Trump's hawkishness with Iran is that he may attempt to use the 2001 AUMF to justify taking military action against Iran. **That would be illegal.** The 2001 authorization targeted the terrorists who perpetrated the 9/11 attacks. It does *not* cover waging war against Iran, 18 years later. To suggest that it does would be a complete failure of American foreign policy.

It's also profoundly unfair to our troops. We can't just let Trump put them in harm's way while Congress hides under our desks, unwilling to debate the war that our President is on the verge of starting. We ask a lot of our troops. Let's honor them by standing up to this President and telling him that he can't just unilaterally start an unnecessary war.

**Congress may be the last check against Trump starting a catastrophic war in the Middle East, and I'm going to do everything I can to make sure we do our duty.** [**Will you have my back?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f177d/3e0906/7b4ad186/3e3087a5/73205800/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-tims-petition?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+have+my+back&utm_campaign=20190627_1_PET_TK_Iran&source=20190627_1_PET_TK_Iran")

Thank you for reading. I'll keep giving you updates about this situation, because it's incredibly important to me that Congress and the American people work together to hold President Trump accountable.

-Tim Kaine

clean_body: | | Derek: I wanted to send you an update about what's happening with our President and Iran, and to ask for your support: Right now, I worry that President Trump is about to wage a dangerous war on his own, with no Congressional oversight. The fact is, Trump had a diplomatic deal that was working to stop Iran's nuclear program. Our allies said it was working. His own advisors even told him it was working. He scrapped it. And now he is close to blundering us into a war with Iran. Why make that choice? After two wars in the Middle East, the last thing we need is for our President to cheer and bluster and tweet us directly into a third one. "" Last week, I introduced an amendment to our national defense bill with Senator Tom Udall to stop Trump from going to war with Iran without Congressional approval. The amendment would prohibit funds being spent on a war with Iran unless Congress authorizes it. Why? Because that's what is required by the Constitution. It's deeply frightening to me that a President who took an oath to uphold that document doesn't get this. So now it's on Congress to put a guardrail up against him, and my Democratic colleagues and I can't do it alone. "" The other enormously concerning aspect of President Trump's hawkishness with Iran is that he may attempt to use the 2001 AUMF to justify taking military action against Iran. That would be illegal. The 2001 authorization targeted the terrorists who perpetrated the 9/11 attacks. It does not cover waging war against Iran, 18 years later. To suggest that it does would be a complete failure of American foreign policy. It's also profoundly unfair to our troops. We can't just let Trump put them in harm's way while Congress hides under our desks, unwilling to debate the war that our President is on the verge of starting. We ask a lot of our troops. Let's honor them by standing up to this President and telling him that he can't just unilaterally start an unnecessary war. Congress may be the last check against Trump starting a catastrophic war in the Middle East, and I'm going to do everything I can to make sure we do our duty. "" Thank you for reading. I'll keep giving you updates about this situation, because it's incredibly important to me that Congress and the American people work together to hold President Trump accountable. -Tim Kaine | **** ""** | "" "" ""

body:
Tonight, John will take his place at the podium in the first Democratic presidential debate, alongside nine other candidates in this primary. But they won't be the only people sharing that stage with | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771794/691c9bd/6d4d6fb6/11a41ac8/307406846/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")

| **Friend,

Every single one of us on Team Hickenlooper woke up this morning excited, motivated, and grateful.**

Tonight, John will take his place at the podium in the first Democratic presidential debate, alongside nine other candidates in this primary. But they won't be the only people sharing that stage with him.

**John will also be sharing this moment with every single person who has stepped up to support, grow, encourage, cheerlead, and believe in this campaign --**enabling us to grow it without depending on _one dime_ of corporate PAC money.

The dedication and determination of this team truly represent what John is all about: bringing people of every gender, age, background and life experience together to collaborate and achieve progressive results.

**Before tonight, we 'll show John a list of everyone who chipped in this week to be a Debate Donor--and we have less than $25,000 left to hit tonight's fundraising goal. name: Kamala Harris
subject: I hope I make you proud tonight
body:
Tonight is an important night -- so I wanted to send you a final note
before I dive back into preparing for the debate. But first, it would mean
a lot to me if you would consider contributing to our campaign and helping
us hit our million-dollar online goal:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190627-eoq?refcode=ema190627-11-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=5436_5755789_YD02yp&akid=5436%2E5755789%2EYD02yp ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190627-eoq?refcode=ema190627-11-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1002&refcode2=5436_5755789_YD02yp&akid=5436%2E5755789%2EYD02yp ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190627-eoq?refcode=ema190627-11-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1003&refcode2=5436_5755789_YD02yp&akid=5436%2E5755789%2EYD02yp ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190627-eoq?refcode=ema190627-11-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1004&refcode2=5436_5755789_YD02yp&akid=5436%2E5755789%2EYD02yp ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190627-eoq?refcode=ema190627-11-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1005&refcode2=5436_5755789_YD02yp&akid=5436%2E5755789%2EYD02yp ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190627-eoq?refcode=ema190627-11-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1006&refcode2=5436_5755789_YD02yp&akid=5436%2E5755789%2EYD02yp ]Another Amount

Last night, you heard many bold, progressive ideas from candidates who
believe in a better America for all of us. Tonight, I will be on for round
two at 9:00 p.m. ET -- and I want you to know how excited I am to face off
against Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, Pete Buttigieg, and others.

In just a few hours, we will have the opportunity to share our own
powerful ideas for the future of our country and make our case directly to
millions of undecided voters -- making this our best chance to set
ourselves apart in a crowded field. We cannot let it go to waste.

As you know, I have been laser-focused on debate prep and have had few
opportunities to fundraise. The bad news is that we’re falling behind on
where we need to be -- but you can do something about it right now:

Add a donation to our campaign as
part of our last-minute fundraising push to reach this million-dollar
online goal. I need your support to get back on track and spend these
final hours focused on my debate prep. Can I count on your help?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190627-eoq?refcode=ema190627-11-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1007&refcode2=5436_5755789_YD02yp&akid=5436%2E5755789%2EYD02yp ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190627-eoq?refcode=ema190627-11-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1008&refcode2=5436_5755789_YD02yp&akid=5436%2E5755789%2EYD02yp ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190627-eoq?refcode=ema190627-11-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1009&refcode2=5436_5755789_YD02yp&akid=5436%2E5755789%2EYD02yp ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190627-eoq?refcode=ema190627-11-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1010&refcode2=5436_5755789_YD02yp&akid=5436%2E5755789%2EYD02yp ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190627-eoq?refcode=ema190627-11-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1011&refcode2=5436_5755789_YD02yp&akid=5436%2E5755789%2EYD02yp ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190627-eoq?refcode=ema190627-11-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1012&refcode2=5436_5755789_YD02yp&akid=5436%2E5755789%2EYD02yp ]Another Amount

Ours is a campaign of the people, by the people, and for ALL people -- and
tonight’s debate will be about what we’re going to do together to move our
country forward. That’s why I’m confident our message will resonate with
the millions of Americans who will be tuning in.

As always, I’m deeply grateful for everything you do. I hope you know your
generosity at moments like these sustains our campaign and makes all the
difference in the world.

One last thing before I go: I hope I make you proud tonight.

For The People,

— Kamala Harris

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5436%2E5755789%2EYD02yp

name: Susan Daggett
subject: I couldn't be more proud of this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | Tonight is the night. My husband, Michael, will be on the Democratic debate stage.

Over the years, Michael and I have made a pretty great team and I couldn't be more proud of him.

But I'm proud of you all as well. We wouldn't be here without your support - from volunteering your time, to sharing his message online, or donating. It takes real people power to create this kind of grassroots movement!

I'm proud we're all a part of Team Bennet.
[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadd5/134673f2/13e1e85/6996af55/3538837476/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_062719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

While Michael is busy prepping for the debate tonight, our next task is looming so I'm reaching out to you.

There's a major FEC deadline on Sunday, June 30. It will be the first time we've officially reported our numbers since he announced he was running for president.

[**Team, Michael wouldn 't be here without all of your generous support but we cannot afford to come up short now. Will you rush a donation to make sure we present a show of force midnight Sunday?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadd5/134673f2/13e1e85/6996af55/3538837476/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_062719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[This first FEC report is a snapshot of our grassroots strength. Please don't delay. Your donation is crucial to the success of our campaign. What is publicly reported after June 30 will set the course for the weeks ahead.

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: JUST IN: Supreme Court strips voters of true representation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
The Supreme Court just upheld extreme partisan gerrymandering in a 5-4 decision. Rush a $5 donation to Teresa’s campaign for U.S. Senate so we can fight back.

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gerrymandering-scotus?refcode=em062719&noskip=true]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gerrymandering-scotus?refcode=em062719&noskip=true]

Dear Friend –

I can’t believe it. I know we have a conservative majority on the Supreme Court – but their decision today to allow “extreme political partisan gerrymandering” is so beyond the pale, I needed to make sure everyone knows what happened, and what we can do about it.

Today’s ruling upholds a broken status quo that tilts the balance of power toward self-interested politicians who make the rules for their own elections . Yet again, we're drawing lines that erase people instead of representing them.
Make no mistake about it, this decision is part of a coordinated assault on the right to equal representation: one-person-one-vote. Whether it’s dismantling of the Voting Rights Act, upholding gerrymandering, or allowing massive corporate influence over our elections with Citizens United, the Supreme Court is chipping away at our democracy, bit by bit.

There’s only one real solution to this problem : elect a Democratic majority in the Senate who will stand up for the principle of one-person-one-vote. The only path to Democratic control runs right through Georgia.

Rush a donation so we can respond to this misguided Supreme Court ruling, and help me fight for your right to equal representation in the Senate. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gerrymandering-scotus?refcode=em062719&noskip=true]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Express Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gerrymandering-scotus?refcode=em062719&amount=5&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gerrymandering-scotus?refcode=em062719&amount=10&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gerrymandering-scotus?refcode=em062719&amount=25&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gerrymandering-scotus?refcode=em062719&amount=50&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gerrymandering-scotus?refcode=em062719&amount=100&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gerrymandering-scotus?refcode=em062719&amount=250&express_lane=true]
Express Donate Some Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gerrymandering-scotus?refcode=em062719&&express_lane=true]

Our great nation was founded on the bedrock principle that voters choose their representatives in government, not the other way around. But that principle wasn’t enshrined for everybody, and today we’re still fighting to ensure that it is.

We need a Democratic majority in the Senate who will appoint Supreme Court justices who will stand up for free and fair elections. And the only way to a Democratic majority is by winning Georgia.

We can take back the courts and we can bring real leadership to Washington, but we can only do it if we unite behind our shared vision for a government that benefits the people, not politicians.

Yours truly,

Teresa

<<View this email in your browser.>> [https://teresatomlinson.com/just-in-supreme-court-strips-voters-of-true-representation/]

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Guess how many local elected officials are in the U.S.
body:
| | Peter, It’s easy to focus on the 2020 presidential contenders and forget that there are tens of thousands of locally elected officials we have the opportunity to choose to serve our communities. More than 65 million Christians, out of the 90 million eligible Christian voters in America, do not vote in local elections. Just how much influence is that left unused? To answer that question, **guess** **how many local elected officials there are in the United States:** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RsPDIXC3rKxErIA0SvIor8rcuBh4Txn0sDhCMEGeL0ytwemVEFTFBHMkcsX6qjPfEkjuQSoAEWDAoxGmzcHrnMs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190627qna01&n=1) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RsPDIXC3rKxErIA0SvIor8rcuBh4Txn0sDhCMEGeL0ytwemVEFTFBHMkcsX6qjPfEujyri2T8fyr0PNiqs0PAxg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190627qna01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RsPDIXC3rKxErIA0SvIor8rcuBh4Txn0sDhCMEGeL0ytwemVEFTFBHMkcsX6qjPfEjpwCd0TKCBSWPWkHyaXceQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190627qna01&n=3) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RsPDIXC3rKxErIA0SvIor8rcuBh4Txn0sDhCMEGeL0ytwemVEFTFBHMkcsX6qjPfEspWNHgAXj6sGFiTQ5gVDb4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190627qna01&n=4) **United. We Stand.** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190627qna01&n=5)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Without the backing of wealthy donors, I truly need your help to build this grassroots movement for big, structural change.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I'm not running to be a president who only pays attention to the wealthy and well-connected. I'm running to be everybody's president. My time is not for sale, and every supporter has an equal... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e3ea/45c30650/17b0609ee/669afa12/436222110/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
There's only one way we're raising money for this campaign.

And it's different from many of the other candidates in this race. But it's the only way to follow through on what I talked about in last night's debate: Making Washington work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.

I'm not holding any fundraisers where you can only get in by writing a big check -- because a person's wealth shouldn't determine the amount of time they can spend with me, or with any presidential candidate.

I'm not counting on a billionaire to fund a Super PAC for me -- because the Democratic primary can't just be one more plaything for the rich and powerful.

I'm not taking a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind -- because our campaign is about people, not powerful special interests.

Instead, we're building a true grassroots campaign with grassroots donors -- because that's the only way we'll create a movement strong enough to make big, structural change in our economy, our government, and our democracy.

**I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important: Before Sunday 's FEC deadline, will you make your first donation to our campaign? $3 or whatever you can chip in would make a huge difference. I can't do this without you.**
| _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically processed:_

>
On a typical presidential campaign, this close to an FEC deadline, my team would be flying me from big city to big city to scoop up as many big fat checks as possible.

Wealthy donors might come see me at fancy receptions in hedge fund offices. They'd sip champagne, nibble on shrimp cocktail, and try to convince me that the tax loophole that just so happens to pad their pockets is also good for the whole country.

But I'm not running to be a president who only pays attention to the wealthy and well-connected.

I'm running to be everybody's president. My time is not for sale, and every supporter has an equal place in our movement.

Instead of getting cozy with the rich and powerful, I'll keep traveling across the country to host meet-and-greets and organizing events. Anyone's welcome to come -- no big check required.

If you ask me, that's what a campaign for president should be all about. Talking with people, in their hometowns, about real solutions to real problems. Getting organized at the grassroots level to make change happen.

But this type of campaign is only possible if everyone who is able pitches in what they can.

I'm running to be the best president that money can't buy, but I can't do it alone. This is how we'll stop Washington from just answering to the beck and call of billionaires and giant corporations -- one grassroots donation at a time.

**Without the backing of wealthy donors, I truly need your help to build this grassroots movement for big, structural change.

[Let's build something incredible together. Please make your first contribution before Sunday's FEC deadline.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e3ea/45c30650/17b0609ee/669afa1e/436222110/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWp1bjE5ZW9xIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYyN2VtMS1lb3EtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jun19eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190627em1-eoq-full")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

**[**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e3ea/45c30650/17b0609ee/669afa1e/436222110/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWp1bjE5ZW9xIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYyN2VtMS1lb3EtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jun19eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190627em1-eoq-full")**

name: [take action] Team Ryan
subject: did you catch the debate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Team,

After months of preparing and talking to voters across the nation, Tim finally had an opportunity to debate his Democratic opponents last night at the first presidential debate of the season and people across the country responded:

[](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9cb6/5486deaa/22e3b68d/dc92ba6/2274694325/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVFWTlVUa0ZOUlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/signup/debate-response?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=TR_EM_EN_ACT_190627_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_EN_ACT_190627_1_1_T2")
[](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9cb6/5486deaa/22e3b68d/dc92ba9/2274694325/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVFWTlVUa0ZOUlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/signup/debate-response?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=TR_EM_EN_ACT_190627_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_EN_ACT_190627_1_1_T2")
**What did you think? Tell us here:[_https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/debate-response_](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9cb6/5486deaa/22e3b68d/dc92ba8/2274694325/VEsF/ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/debate-response?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomdebateres&utm_campaign=TR_EM_EN_ACT_190627_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_EN_ACT_190627_1_1_T2")**

Later today, Tim is going to email you about last night, but before he does, we wanted to hear how you think the candidates measured up.

Were the issues that matter most to you discussed? Did the debate help you determine who you're going to support in the presidential primary? Did anyone surprise you?

[_**We 'll be sharing these responses directly with Tim and the team tomorrow so get your responses in now!**_](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9cb6/5486deaa/22e3b68d/dc92bab/2274694325/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVFWTlVUa0ZOUlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/signup/debate-response?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+Wersquoll+be+sharing+these+responses+dir&utm_campaign=TR_EM_EN_ACT_190627_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_EN_ACT_190627_1_1_T2")

[TAKE THE DEBATE SURVEY](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9cb6/5486deaa/22e3b68d/dc92baa/2274694325/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVFWTlVUa0ZOUlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/signup/debate-response?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-+TAKE+THE+DEBATE+SURVEY&utm_campaign=TR_EM_EN_ACT_190627_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_EN_ACT_190627_1_1_T2")

body:
| | | **Will you take 10 seconds to let us know how important the climate crisis issue is to you?** One-Click Survey for dpwillis67@gmail.com

**How important is it to you to combat the climate crisis?**

**[Extremely Important>>](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1ddec/693b8b0a/585733e5/72de8cb8/345754914/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/climate-change-survey?source=062719_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**

**We need 54 responses from Democrats in 18326. Please submit your response by 8:59 PM ET** Hello - At last night's first Democratic debate, moderators only spent nine minutes talking about the climate crisis.

That's not nearly enough time.

The US US Climate Assessment warns that the world's temperatures could go up nine degrees in the next 80 years!

The climate crisis is so urgent that a recent poll from Morning Consult showed that 63% of Democratic voters rate climate change as the most important issue.

That's why we want to know where you stand before tonight's next debate. **How important is it to you to combat the climate crisis?**

name: Yang2020
subject: TONIGHT: The First Debate - How to Watch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | | |
---
| Friend -- We hope you're as excited as we are for the debate! Andrew's currently preparing for the stage tonight. He's relaxing, reviewing his prep materials, and listening to the commentary on last night's debate. If the first night is any indication, Andrew will definitely stand out, talking about issues facing the average American and providing 21st Century solutions to these problems. Here's the information on how to watch the debate:
* The debate will air live on NBC, MSNBC, and Telemundo, starting at 9pm ET
* The debate will stream live on NBCnews.com, MSNBC.com, and the NBC News app
* The debate will stream live on all Telemundo digital platforms

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: A chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
It wasn’t very long ago that the issues we’ve led on throughout the years were considered radical.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1864%2E150750%2EzOvtBq)
Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to our campaign before tonight’s debate. I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
The truth is, it wasn’t very long ago that the issues we’ve led on throughout the years were considered radical:
Medicare for all? “Too extreme,” they said. A $15 minimum wage? “That’s crazy,” we heard. Free college tuition? “A fringe idea,” people suggested.
Today, these are mainstream positions. You heard a number of candidates embrace them last night, and I expect the same will happen later this evening.
But what differentiates our campaign from all the others is not only that we have led on these issues for a long time, but that we are offering transformational change and giving people a role in making it happen.
Because that is the only way change will happen – if we have the courage to build a grassroots movement to take on our rigged economy held in place by a corrupt system of campaign finance.
That is the political revolution. Because I cannot do this alone, Sisters and brothers. And that is why I have to ask:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to our campaign before tonight’s debate begins? This is an important day for our campaign, so your donation means a lot. Especially ahead of this FEC deadline.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/12469?refcode=em190627-1-90&t=26&akid=1864%2E150750%2EzOvtBq)
Together, we must finally confront the power structure of this country whose greed has done so much harm to the economic and moral fabric of America. I’m excited to talk more about that tonight, and am thankful to know that you’re with me as I head to the debate.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/12469?refcode=em190627-1-90&t=27&akid=1864%2E150750%2EzOvtBq)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=1864%2E150750%2EzOvtBq). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=29&akid=1864%2E150750%2EzOvtBq). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1864_150750_zOvtBq&akid=1864%2E150750%2EzOvtBq).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=31&akid=1864%2E150750%2EzOvtBq).

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Border Crisis is Real – Democrats Need to Stop Playing Politics with People's Lives
body:
"Our immigration system is in desperate need of reform." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=424c07dc61&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Border Crisis is Real – Democrats Need to Stop Playing Politics with People's Lives**

“Our immigration system is in desperate need of reform,” Rep. Michael McCaul (R-TX) writes in Fox News. “If Democrats truly wanted to help vulnerable populations, they would not have waited until this week – when the crisis is at a breaking point – to act.”

Of course, the media covers Democrats’ selective outrage more than Republicans’ actual solutions. The Securing America's Future Act, for example, “would have provided a solution for DACA recipients and $25 billion for border security, while also addressing our outdated asylum laws by closing the legal loopholes which have unfortunately functioned as a magnet to drug cartels and human traffickers.”

Every single Democrat voted down the measure.

Recently, House Republicans put forward the Border Crisis Supplemental Appropriations Act, which includes $3.3 billion in humanitarian aid for children and families at the border. A similar, bipartisan bill in the Senate passed its Appropriations Committee by a 30-1 vote. House Democrats ignored both, pursuing their own partisan bill that appeases the far-left base while impeding real, bipartisan legislation.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d371ac463e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| At this week’s G20 Summit in Osaka, Japan, “President Donald Trump will meet with China’s President Xi and other world leaders to continue fighting for U.S. interests abroad,” Corey Lewandowski writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ae31dea97&e=3ee4985eea). Globalists attack President Trump’s trade agenda while ignoring this key fact: “We have a system dominated by nations which engage in all kinds of ways to cheat international trade laws for their own benefit,” Lewandowski says. “China stands at the forefront of this misbehavior.”
---
|
---
| “Congress is debating emergency humanitarian aid to care for migrants on the U.S.-Mexico border. The need is obvious. With virtually no barrier to stop them, thousands of migrants are crossing illegally into the United States every day,” Byron York writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ef3e9c2696&e=3ee4985eea). “This moment might be a time for introspection for those who have consistently downplayed the urgency of the situation on the border.”
---
|
---
| “The Mexican government claims to be deporting more Central Americans found in the country illegally and says the move is a direct result of enhanced enforcement operations mandated in a deal with the Trump administration,” Anna Giaritelli reports for the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bb10f63a13&e=3ee4985eea). “Data released Tuesday evening by Mexico's Institute of National Migration show the country has sent back more people in the first few weeks of June than any recent month.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1575604e77&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a80841f0d9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=084cc47932)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Trent Bolger
subject: Did you see Wilmot's new video, team?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
In the new video our campaign released yesterday, Wilmot shared his story about what Montana means to him and why he's running for Senate.
**[Did you see the video, team? Watch it now--then chip in $5 to help us reach even more people with Wilmot's message about fighting for all of us.](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-video?refcode=em190627&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thanks for your support,
Trent Bolger
Campaign Manager
Wilmot Collins for Senate

**[watch the video](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-video?refcode=em190627&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

\---Original Message from Wilmot Collins---
Team,
When I arrived in Helena, Montana 25 years ago as a refugee of the Liberian civil war, my sense of purpose was restored. I knew that day that I'd spend my life giving back to this state and this country that gave me a second chance and provided my family with opportunity.
**[As I kick off my campaign for U.S. Senate, I want to share part of that story with you. Watch our new launch video now, then contribute $5 to help us start this campaign strong.](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-video?refcode=em190627&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
[](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-video?refcode=em190627&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
My family will serve this country until the day we die. Six months after I came to the U.S., I enlisted in the Army National Guard. I went on to serve in the Army Reserves and Navy Reserves for over twenty years. My wife and daughter both chose to serve this nation as well.
That spirit of service and sacrifice for our state and our country is what led me to serve as mayor of Helena--and now to run to represent all Montanans in the U.S. Senate.
As your next Senator, I will deliver on health care. I will do everything in my power to address climate change. I will support our public schools and teachers. I will stand with our unions. And I will fight to defend our public lands. But I need you with me in the battles ahead.
[**Watch our new campaign launch video now to hear why I will always fight for Montana and this nation that we love. Then, contribute $5 to jumpstart my campaign for Senate.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-video?refcode=em190627&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Wilmot

**[watch the video](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-video?refcode=em190627&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
---

Supporters like you are a crucial part of our team, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616477c/1e3760f0/69c46d26/5f7ea979/2834999948/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). To change your email address or update your contact info, [click here.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616477c/1e3760f0/69c46d26/5f7ea976/2834999948/VEsO/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/update-your-contact-info?source=footer") [Make a contribution now to elect Wilmot Collins as Montana's next U.S. Senator.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616477c/1e3760f0/69c46d26/5f7ea977/2834999948/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=footer")

name: Meg, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: we could fall short
body:
|
---
I'm so excited that polling shows Jim leading Lt. Governor Tate Reeves 45 points to 40. But I'm also nervous -- because I know things can change very quickly on a race as competitive as this one.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MEvpaOt6cX4DoVU03C2oeh7DlvnV6bMv_QT2h5w41h8=/zc0xEMTbtdZh-B2-sf-d9pLCP7FwYS7__-VLE0-spno=?refcode=20190627nd&amount=10)
---
Friend,

I'm so excited that polling shows Jim leading Lt. Governor Tate Reeves 45 points to 40. But I'm also nervous -- because I know things can change very quickly on a race as competitive as this one, and because Reeves has _$6 million_ (yes, you read that right) in the bank.

Some of that $6 million is already going toward ads attacking Jim. Our opponents are clearly afraid of Jim's incredible record and his plans for our state. The problem is, **if we don 't fight back NOW, some of those ads could start sticking in voters' minds**... and we could fall short on Election Day.

**That 's where our end-of-quarter goal comes in. We're looking to raise $60,000 online to make sure we can stand up to Reeves' attacks and spread Jim's message across Mississippi. Will you pitch in before Sunday's deadline?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Meg
