name: Rosie Castro
subject: RE: humbly asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9d/3eb3e2fc/4464ad9b/744aff32/1533031137/VEsH/ "https://www.julianforthefuture.com")
---
| | Watching my son Julian in the Presidential debates last night was one of the proudest moments of my life. [_**If you 're as proud of Julian as I am, I'm asking you to rush $15 before midnight to ensure he's in the next set of Presidential debates. He needs 130,000 donors to make the cut -- will you be one of them? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9d/3eb3e2fc/4464ad9b/744aff31/1533031137/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190627_em_fr_b2_rosie_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") -Rosie \-- Original Message -- [_**I hope you 'll give me a second to explain what tonight means for my family -- and if you can, please consider chipping in $15 before midnight to my son, Julian's historic campaign for President. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9d/3eb3e2fc/4464ad9b/744aff31/1533031137/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190627_em_fr_b2_rosie_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") Tonight, I'll watch my son Julian take the Presidential debate stage. I'm struggling to put into words what this means to me. My mother came to this country as an orphan when she was just 7 years old. She provided for us by cleaning houses. She never complained. She took such pride in the opportunity to make a living in this great country. And now, her grandson will be on the Presidential debate stage tonight. She never could have imagined this. **Juli an's campaign is about so much more than winning the Presidency -- it's the product of my mother's sacrifice -- it's proof of the American Dream. ** It's about everyday Americans who deserve to be led by fellow everyday Americans. It's about leaders who will fight with everything they have for us -- because they are us. [_**That 's why I'm asking you to fight for Julian tonight, because he shares your burden -- and he won't be relieved of it until you are, too. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9d/3eb3e2fc/4464ad9b/744aff31/1533031137/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190627_em_fr_b2_rosie_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") I know every dollar is precious to your family. That's why it would mean so much to me if you could chip in $15 to my son's campaign. Rosie Castro

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9d/3eb3e2fc/4464ad9b/744aff39/1533031137/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9d/3eb3e2fc/4464ad9b/744aff38/1533031137/VEsHAQ/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd9d/3eb3e2fc/4464ad9b/744aff27/1533031137/VEsHAA/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: RE: Flip the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I have a critical favor to ask: [_**Will you chip in $15 before my friend Ben Ray Luj an's first end-of-quarter deadline? Top Democrats and I are banding together to raise $50,000 before midnight to ensure Ben Ray wins his critical race to flip the Senate. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b533/18e32a7f/59a2000d/7bacffdb/79524326/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190627_em_fr_b2_rosen_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25") My Senate race was one of the most competitive in the entire country last year. I'll never forget how many people chipped in and fought alongside me to flip this seat for Democrats. So this election, I'm putting everything I have into electing more Democratic Senators to join me. My friend Ben Ray Lujan's race is the most competitive open Senate seat in the entire country. **And believe me when I say we cannot win back the Senate and defeat the GOP without winning Ben Ray 's race.** He's facing his very first end-of-quarter deadline, and I want to give him every resource he needs to beat back Republicans' attacks and win. [_**It would mean so much to me if you 'd chip in $15 and help me raise $50,000 for Ben Ray's monumental Senate race before midnight. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b533/18e32a7f/59a2000d/7bacffdb/79524326/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190627_em_fr_b2_rosen_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25") Thank you, Jacky Rosen

name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: Make sure John sees your name tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Tonight, John will take his place at the podium in the first Democratic presidential debate, alongside nine other candidates in this primary. But they won't be the only people sharing that stage with | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377176a/691c9bd/6d41da52/11a41b83/2151278780/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| **Friend,

Every single one of us on Team Hickenlooper woke up this morning excited, motivated, and grateful.**

Tonight, John will take his place at the podium in the first Democratic presidential debate, alongside nine other candidates in this primary. But they won't be the only people sharing that stage with him.

**John will also be sharing this moment with every single person who has stepped up to support, grow, encourage, cheerlead, and believe in this campaign --**enabling us to grow it without depending on _one dime_ of corporate PAC money.

The dedication and determination of this team truly represent what John is all about: bringing people of every gender, age, background and life experience together to collaborate and achieve progressive results.

**Before tonight, we 'll show John a list of everyone who chipped in this week to be a Debate Donor--and we have less than $25,000 left to hit tonight's fundraising goal. This is your last call to be on that list--will you add your name?** ****[](https://secure.hickenlooper. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Still focused on impeachment...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
We are halfway through President Trump's term and Nancy Pelosi and her liberal friends are still fixated on impeachment?! This is ridiculous.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YKZ2NKGeaOuSFVeI4f0YkeJ6asw8gEHBdcomHFJ2BmUH-SfyaygF1NIBMjqto24shwjNXMc6kiSYo4LrkdHgBRrgBHSSmYD5GCO4oZPtkZzDbIYTppNMeI-Javo9TQ8hiQ81H9aUQqJWhko6zRStIMpMKiJrNln3xIM17dDpt7o5sWDGmvrxbQ==&c=z7woNPpGWS0AreD3iFX0Lw7ht6G6LJijEB24xp7kxA5MMmBnDsIcnA==&ch=4-CCA4KvPEm-__kM6bqb7LZmYor8ButO87zUmWNokpmTVA7nT7YydA==)
---
| The attacks against our President are unprecedented and to be honest, we are all tired of it. Our people are tired of baseless witch hunts, tired of the hate and threats, and tired of the political games. Seriously, how many different ways can they threaten President Trump with impeachment without any backing or evidence?
The left needs to GET BACK TO WORK. They are clearly clueless and have lost touch with their constituents. When will they move on from the 2016 elections and let our President get to work for the American people? They fail to accept that fact that President Trump HAS delivered on his promises and that America is THRIVING!
Our President needs more people in Congress who will work WITH him instead of AGAINST him. You and I know that I am the guy for the job. Will you join me in protecting President Trump by sending me to Congress again in 2020?
---

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: something really big for Jeanne Shaheen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Senator Shaheen emailed you yesterday because something really big just happened in her campaign: Republicans are officially launching campaigns to try and defeat her.
It really is all hands on deck, everyone. CBS News says this race could decide Senate control, and Mitch McConnell's right-wing group has already launched attack ads to defeat Jeanne and maintain its Senate majority. Jeanne has to be prepared.
**The stakes couldn 't be higher, so Jeanne is relying on everyone in this community -- including you -- to do their part in protecting this Democratic Senate seat. [Please give $3 or more today to stand with Jeanne and win back a Democratic Senate majority.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc201/2a380d31/3e31c53b/f13bb0/3003548878/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA2MjdfTVdINENKUzJfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190627_MWH4CJS2_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**

name: Addisu, Booker 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Presidential, team. In one word, that's how I'd describe the Cory Booker millions of Americans met for the first time last night. He was poised and passionate. He had thoughtful, well-reasoned answers on the toughest issues we face as a country. And my favorite part: He showed he's more than ready to take on Donald Trump. Here's what I know for sure: **Cory needs to be at every one of these debates. ** From what I can tell, America agrees. Thousands of donations flooded in last night -- many people giving for the first time. The average donation was $19.58. But even just a $1 donation matters right now. **Cory needs more than 30,000 more donors to qualify for future debates --[_will you chip in?_](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190627-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190627_AD_20190627-fr-AD-presidential-actives_2020ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=1")** I have it on good information that Cory's going to be making calls over the next few days to say thank you to people who are chipping in right now. You should make a donation -- and make sure you keep your phone nearby. So proud to be on this team right now, Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020
[](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190627-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190627_AD_20190627-fr-AD-presidential-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09a0/5fca0d19/9f39b1f/291bf4ae/364185976/VEsD/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09a0/5fca0d19/9f39b1f/291bf4ad/364185976/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09a0/5fca0d19/9f39b1f/291bf4ac/364185976/VEsB/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09a0/5fca0d19/9f39b1f/291bf4ab/364185976/VEsO/ "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

body:
This just in:

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190627_em-1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend: **Moments ago, the Supreme Court ruled to allow partisan gerrymandering.**

Partisan gerrymandering guts the principle at the core of our democracy: Voters choose their representatives -- not the other way around. This decision will allow Republicans to drown out voters' voices by rigging maps to preserve their power.

And it's clear that we cannot rely on the Supreme Court -- stacked with Donald Trump's ultra-conservative appointees -- to defend our American values.

**Team, we MUST take back the U.S. Senate for Democrats so we can pass legislation to defend our democracy. That means winning this critical Senate race in Minnesota, which Donald Trump himself is targeting to turn red.**

**[Before our critical end-of-quarter deadline on Sunday, rush an urgent contribution of $10 or as much as you can to take back the Senate for Democrats. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7848976/74828186/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTVhZDFiYy0yZDk5LWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKi2IACEE9zcDR7I-Z2O9rgeuGjrXHG3tKFnoV1B7so=)

Peter, Big news — our race is receiving national attention! Today, the Intercept published an article that highlights the amazing movement we created last election:

“In Texas’ 10th district, Mike Siegel ran an aggressive race against Michael McCaul, the Republican currently serving in Tom DeLay’s former seat. The national party didn’t have the race on its radar, but Siegel, who put together a strong grassroots network and ran as an outspoken progressive, gave McCaul a scare, losing by a margin of 4 percentage points."

**[Let's keep the momentum going! Can you chip in $10, $20, or $50 so we can finish off the quarter strong and hit our $25,000 goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7848977/74828187/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTVhZDFiYy0yZDk5LWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKi2IACEE9zcDR7I-Z2O9rgeuGjrXHG3tKFnoV1B7so=&refcode=em062719)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7848978/74828188/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTVhZDFiYy0yZDk5LWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKi2IACEE9zcDR7I-Z2O9rgeuGjrXHG3tKFnoV1B7so=&refcode=em062719) We know you can’t beat McCaul by outspending him, only by outworking him. As the Intercept quotes our campaign as saying, “In 2018, we stepped up and ran our campaign the right way in a district that the state and national party had left for dead. We campaigned in all nine counties, had 1,000 volunteers. We put this district in play. We made up 15 percentage points against an incumbent considered to be unbeatable. We put this in play. Running a top-down campaign attempting to buy a district is what McCaul did, that’s not what we need here.” We’ve built a team of 1,000 volunteers, and over 1,000 donors, too. We are so close to winning this district, but only if we keep the incredible momentum we’ve generated going. [**We have a big $25,000 goal to hit before Sunday at midnight. Can we count on you to join our team and donate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7848979/74828189/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTVhZDFiYy0yZDk5LWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKi2IACEE9zcDR7I-Z2O9rgeuGjrXHG3tKFnoV1B7so=&refcode=em062719) It will take every donor we can get to counter McCaul’s corporate machine. Hard-working people don’t usually have thousands to spend on political donations, but thousands of hard-working people giving what they can are a greater force than any corporate PAC could ever hope to be.
| [Chip in Before June 30th! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7848980/74828190/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTVhZDFiYy0yZDk5LWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKi2IACEE9zcDR7I-Z2O9rgeuGjrXHG3tKFnoV1B7so=&refcode=em062719)

clean_body: = Peter, Big news — our race is receiving national attention! Today, the Intercept published an article that highlights the amazing movement we created last election: “In Texas’ 10th district, Mike Siegel ran an aggressive race against Michael McCaul, the Republican currently serving in Tom DeLay’s former seat. The national party didn’t have the race on its radar, but Siegel, who put together a strong grassroots network and ran as an outspoken progressive, gave McCaul a scare, losing by a margin of 4 percentage points." We know you can’t beat McCaul by outspending him, only by outworking him. As the Intercept quotes our campaign as saying, “In 2018, we stepped up and ran our campaign the right way in a district that the state and national party had left for dead. We campaigned in all nine counties, had 1,000 volunteers. We put this district in play. We made up 15 percentage points against an incumbent considered to be unbeatable. We put this in play. Running a top-down campaign attempting to buy a district is what McCaul did, that’s not what we need here.” We’ve built a team of 1,000 volunteers, and over 1,000 donors, too. We are so close to winning this district, but only if we keep the incredible momentum we’ve generated going. It will take every donor we can get to counter McCaul’s corporate machine. Hard-working people don’t usually have thousands to spend on political donations, but thousands of hard-working people giving what they can are a greater force than any corporate PAC could ever hope to be. | For the people, Mike Siegel G M T Y | Detect languageAfrikaansAlbanianAmharicArabicArmenianAzerbaijaniBasqueBelarusianBengaliBosnianBulgarianCatalanCebuanoChichewaChinese (Simplified)Chinese body:
This Saturday is our campaign's last fundraiser before our critical June 30th fundraising deadline and I hope you can join us!

The fundraiser will be from 4:30-6:30 pm this Saturday, June 29th, and you can find all the specifics on the invite flyer below.

**It 's important though that my team gets an accurate count for who all is coming ahead of time, so please [RSVP](https://act.myngp.com/el/BQfs1OnXGD4yh6KU8jxKxFVg6aN-CXVqj6xqiSkFFU0=/zF-366eVwGTdSTaUaeoCybEifwbgv94Gfp79uws1Wl4=) to let us know if you can make it. **

If you already have other plans please [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BQfs1OnXGD4yh6KU8jxKxFVg6aN-CXVqj6xqiSkFFU0=/GAL-DFAao4V9GVE5JnnYAbDWd7ZPJT-O2WQuOJgtlbs=) to help ensure we hit our goal.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BQfs1OnXGD4yh6KU8jxKxFVg6aN-CXVqj6xqiSkFFU0=/zF-366eVwGTdSTaUaeoCybEifwbgv94Gfp79uws1Wl4=)

[**If you would like to make a donation immediately or buy your ticket now, you can do so here >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BQfs1OnXGD4yh6KU8jxKxFVg6aN-CXVqj6xqiSkFFU0=/UVtpDvbDhNrvWK-N05V2_Jq4LltTCZDThXNS1YItpns=)

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: 🔴 This is terrible news, I need a minute of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a180/6cd27893/4da5ba4a/15807890/2265849704/VEsH/ "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | The Supreme Court just decided that federal courts have _no role_ in ending partisan gerrymandering, and instead are leaving that work to Congress and to state legislatures. This Congress is deeply indebted to special interests and filled with Representatives that would lose their seats if gerrymandering were ended. State legislatures are actively pursuing blatant attempts at voter suppression, at undermining communities of color, women, low-income Americans, and ex-felons. [**We must take back the Senate if we stand any chance of ending this system of oppression. Will you rush an emergency donation right now to help me do that?**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a180/6cd27893/4da5ba4a/15807891/2265849704/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blue-wave-project?refcode=2019-06-27-scotus&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Too many people in power right now have a vested interest in protecting the status quo. If they were forced to win elections based on true majority support, they would lose. So they're picking their voters, instead of the other way around -- and Mitch McConnell has no problem letting that go on, forever. In 2020, I'm not just seeking reelection -- I'm fighting to reclaim the Senate. That's why I'm not running for President in 2020. That's why I wasn't on that debate stage last night and won't be tonight. [Donate Now](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a180/6cd27893/4da5ba4a/15807891/2265849704/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blue-wave-project?refcode=2019-06-27-scotus&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") If we don't take back the Senate next year, we face another 10 years of gerrymandered districts. If he wins, Trump could appoint more judges to lifetime appointments, where they'll uphold far-right attempts at gutting reproductive freedoms and rolling back protections for immigrants and the LGBTQ+ community. clean_body: | "" | | The Supreme Court just decided that federal courts have no role in ending partisan gerrymandering, and instead are leaving that work to Congress and to state legislatures. This Congress is deeply indebted to special interests and filled with Representatives that would lose their seats if gerrymandering were ended. State legislatures are actively pursuing blatant attempts at voter suppression, at undermining communities of color, women, low-income Americans, and ex-felons. "" Too many people in power right now have a vested interest in protecting the status quo. If they were forced to win elections based on true majority support, they would lose. So they're picking their voters, instead of the other way around -- and Mitch McConnell has no problem letting that go on, forever. In 2020, I'm not just seeking reelection -- I'm fighting to reclaim the Senate. That's why I'm not running for President in 2020. That's why I wasn't on that debate stage last night and won't be tonight. "" If we don't take back the Senate next year, we face another 10 years of gerrymandered districts. If he wins, Trump could appoint more judges to lifetime appointments, where they'll uphold far-right attempts at gutting reproductive freedoms and rolling back protections for immigrants and the LGBTQ+ community. We'll never get H.R. 1, the anti-corruption and pro-democracy "For the People Act," signed into law, and we'll miss our last and best opportunity to address the climate crisis before it's too late. "" I need you to step into this fight. We are the last line of defense. name: Team Warren
subject: Here's what happens after June 30:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
After June 30 -- which is just three days away -- every presidential campaign will put together a report to show how much they've raised and how many people have donated in the past three months. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e3fd/45c30650/1789d9426/669aeaab/2410551758/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
We'll be honest: We're about to ask if you can chip in before Sunday's FEC fundraising deadline.

But first, can we explain why this deadline is such a big deal?

After June 30 -- which is just three days away -- every presidential campaign will put together a report to show how much they've raised and how many people have donated in the past three months.

The reports will be public.

Reporters and pundits _love_ digging into these fundraising numbers, and they'll scour Elizabeth's report to judge how well we're doing.

But they're not the only ones who will be paying close attention.

Wall Street bankers and billionaire CEOs will want to see how seriously they should take our movement -- because the stronger we are, the sooner the wealthy and well-connected will lose their power over Washington.

**We 're about to get sized up. So let's show how strong we are when we fight side by side.

Thank you for everything you do as a member of this team. Can you chip in before Sunday's big FEC fundraising deadline to help make our movement, and our FEC report, as strong as possible?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically processed:_

---
>
Your support will help Elizabeth keep fighting for her plans to make big, structural change.

And you'll keep building the grassroots movement that will make those plans happen.

We can fight for everything Elizabeth talked about in last night's debate, and more -- Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, Universal Child Care and early education, free public college, canceling student loan debt, ending Washington corruption, and leveling the playing field for working people.

**But we can only get it done if we make our grassroots movement as big as possible, and that takes real resources.

Elizabeth isn't raising money at private fundraising events with wealthy donors, and she doesn't take any checks from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind.

[Instead, we're building this together -- people like you reading emails like this one, and chipping in what they can, when they can. If you're able to, please make your first contribution today. Help make sure we're in the best possible position before we have to make our fundraising numbers public.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e3fd/45c30650/1789d9426/669aea97/2410551758/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWp1bjE5ZW9xIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYyN2VtMi1lb3EtZnVsbC1hIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jun19eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190627em2-eoq-full-a")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

**[**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e3fd/45c30650/1789d9426/669aea97/2410551758/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWp1bjE5ZW9xIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYyN2VtMi1lb3EtZnVsbC1hIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jun19eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190627em2-eoq-full-a")**

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I need a favor:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | | [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b530/18e32a7f/59b361be/7bacf217/3483433112/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190627_em_fr_b3_haaland_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")
---
I have a critical favor to ask:

[**_I 'm asking you to chip in $15 before my friend Ben Ray Lujan's first end-of-quarter deadline. New Mexicans and I are banding together to raise $50,000 before midnight to ensure Ben Ray wins his critical Senate race and ousts Mitch McConnell. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b530/18e32a7f/59b361be/7bacf217/3483433112/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190627_em_fr_b3_haaland_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")

I've known Ben Ray for a long time, so believe me when I tell you he's a fighter.

I watched him lead the fight to take back the House for Democrats and the American people.

I watched him fight to bring justice and equality to all people through his platform as Assistant Speaker of the U.S. House and the highest-ranking Hispanic in Congress.

And I watched him fight to pave the way for candidates like me to become one of the first Native American women in Congress.

**I know he 's our best chance to win the Senate, too -- that's why New Mexicans and I are joining forces today to help Ben Ray have a massive fundraising day.**

Look, this race is the most competitive open Senate seat in the country.

So I'll be honest: If we don't put everything we have into winning here in New Mexico, it will be very difficult to defeat Mitch McConnell's Senate nationwide.

Ben Ray's facing his very first end-of-quarter deadline, and I want to give him every resource he needs to beat back Republicans' attacks and win.

**[_It would mean so much to me if you 'd chip in $15 and help me raise $50,000 for Ben Ray's monumental Senate race before midnight. >> _](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b530/18e32a7f/59b361be/7bacf217/3483433112/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190627_em_fr_b3_haaland_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")**

Thank you,

Deb Haaland

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b530/18e32a7f/59b361be/7bacf214/3483433112/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b530/18e32a7f/59b361be/7bacf215/3483433112/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b530/18e32a7f/59b361be/7bacf20a/3483433112/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

[Unsubscribe](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b530/18e32a7f/59b361be/7bacf20b/3483433112/VEsB/ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")

name: Chris Evans, Beto for America
subject: After last night’s debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
#
Did you see last night’s debate? Beto presented a bold, new vision for America and showed what our campaign is all about.
He’s made it a priority to travel all over the country to _listen_ to people about the issues that matter most to them. Last night, it showed, and Beto won over many new hearts and minds.
From the beginning, he’s been on the road, holding town halls where anyone can ask any question or share any idea. He’s brought new people in like never before. And he’s made this campaign accountable to real people -- not PACs, lobbyists, corporations, or special interests.
June 30 is our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, when we will close the books and report our numbers to the FEC. There’s a lot to lose. Everyone will be looking at our report to see if we’ve built a viable campaign. _Let’s show them we’re up for overcoming any challenge, and we’re willing to put the work in to win._
[Help Beto keep up last night’s momentum and post strong grassroots fundraising numbers before our deadline. Chip in $3 or more now. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17992?refcode=ema20190627-39124&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=39124%2E444211%2EGjqKu3)
Thank you for being part of this important moment. We’re counting on you.
Talk soon,
Chris Evans
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17992?refcode=ema20190627-39124&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=39124%2E444211%2EGjqKu3)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=39124%2E444211%2EGjqKu3). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Greg Pence (personal)
subject: Need Hoosier help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence Victory |
body:
First of all, I just want to say thank you. It means so much to Denise and I to have grassroots support from Sixth District Hoosiers who know my... Friend,
First of all, I just want to say thank you.
It means so much to Denise and I to have grassroots support from Sixth District Hoosiers who know my commitment to service and have been with us every step of the way.
It’s only through your support that I got to Washington to fight for our conservative Hoosier values in the first place. This Sunday night, June 30th, at 11:59pm, marks an official Federal Election Commission Quarterly Fundraising Deadline. After this, we are required to report our numbers publicly.
Thankfully, a group of generous Hoosier donors is offering to double your donation before this deadline! This is a big opportunity and we’re so thankful. **[Donate here to help out (your donation doubled).](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=946dc265c7a54c31849f0e5a029bc2eb&_e=NDXSpTCfuPc34YuM_oySg1fMwv_1vffb8UJSewdIs-yu-TdtdLOTqH9l9kBhgpSwSVyVI4rdqE-cmk0pkQ9El7fFqn_SBC4MG8AOAfq-Ew_z9Dd8cSPz-l1gfBvYNVqw7COm8qWl_V_kPMV4VGjlPHQFI8d2KoalN8YiV0IR0iPXDsFkvfRNKRRxCQ3ae1OADraEfhrh8Qqp3o62ZWd87WfIw5PSCNzqo450B9f6ma9blS0i3Rkdlo9xBDJ3euyQL2Pn9s7qApJcZDowGXXRW5KhokfK0hOpktlIuFDzNwvbmVfhQQXDBA-g8LPmCMXkatd2cJqED9OVLMi79cQ9W3ls20TaQMXWfG1LxilN_I-UEzey-Y0ZR8oYqpWYA1brKB3lXcap9tdnzEhen54pNL-LvKwyfyutW6wkRZ6Nz0I%3D)**
Team Pence will always be a target of D.C. liberal special interests – that’s nothing something that is going away anytime soon. If you want to help me fight back and ensure that we have the funds necessary to compete today, and all the way through Election Day, **[would you consider donating before this big deadline?](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=946dc265c7a54c31849f0e5a029bc2eb&_e=NDXSpTCfuPc34YuM_oySg1fMwv_1vffb8UJSewdIs-yu-TdtdLOTqH9l9kBhgpSwSVyVI4rdqE-cmk0pkQ9El7fFqn_SBC4MG8AOAfq-Ew_z9Dd8cSPz-l1gfBvYNVqw7COm8qWl_V_kPMV4VGjlPHQFI8d2KoalN8YiV0IR0iPXDsFkvfRNKRRxCQ3ae1OADraEfhrh8Qqp3o62ZWd87aLCw-MU7i-JT5Un0-rSh2NcAFfoTpAsEg7sVtsqL6g3zz6B_x58OPAIf99WhVyU-qyyAea8KO4Uz5HZAOp37iuSoeEFewBlX_2iPLIFhsTuupRsTXyB10AqWjyNttr8wlKbhJcb-vbxdj9AacLBu-iFQO4YdVGlkVsmvFLwqB8sliFIckI4TlVw0rCsA-vbg4wJ6X5ion4jIWnvuKhm-uE%3D)**

name: [Survey] OurRevolution.com
subject: Question re: tonight's debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Answer before 9 pm ET

[**Answer our survey to tell us which issues you 're looking forward to seeing debated on the national stage tonight->**](https://go.ourrevolution. "https://go.ourrevolution.com/0619-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+Answer+our+survey+to+tell+us+which+issue&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2")
**[Answer Here](https://go.ourrevolution. "https://go.ourrevolution.com/0619-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+Answer+Here&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2")**

* * *
Are you ready for tonight's debate, friend?

The whole team at Our Revolution is excited to watch Bernie lay out his vision of Medicare for All, College for All, Good Jobs for All, Justice for All, and of course, the people-powered political revolution that's necessary to turn our vision into law.

[**What issues do you want to see Democrats talk about during tonight 's debate?**](https://go.ourrevolution. "https://go.ourrevolution.com/0619-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=3+-+What+issues+do+you+want+to+see+Democrats&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2")

When Bernie first stepped onto the national debate stage nearly four years ago during his 2016 campaign for president, ideas like getting big money out of politics, a $15 an hour minimum wage, healthcare for all and free college for all were considered fringe. **Now, they are mainstream.**

[**Are you looking forward to seeing Democrats debate Medicare for All and College for All tonight? Let us know here ->**](https://go.ourrevolution. "https://go.ourrevolution.com/0619-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=4+-+Are+you+looking+forward+to+seeing+Democr&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2")

As Bernie always says: change happens from the bottom up. It always has, and it always will.

That's why Our Revolution groups across the country are working hard to build a grassroots political movement powerful enough to take on the political establishment and every special interest that stands in the way of our policies passing the House and Senate.

**We must elect a Democrat who will defeat Donald Trump next year,** but no candidate is capable of challenging the rise of authoritarianism or the entrenched power of our political establishment without a united grassroots movement behind them.

[**Before tonight 's debate, share your thoughts on what issues will be most important for Democrats to address in order to defeat Donald Trump.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a446/bed43eb/92c6ec4b/75fae10c/2044213100/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/0619-survey?utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=5+-+Before+tonightrsquos+debate+share+your+t&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2")
**[Answer Here](https://go.ourrevolution. "https://go.ourrevolution.com/0619-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=6+-+Answer+Here&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2")**
Thanks for sharing your opinion.

In Solidarity,

The whole team at Our Revolution

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a446/bed43eb/92c6ec4b/75fae10e/2044213100/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=7+-+update+your+info&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a446/bed43eb/92c6ec4b/75fae109/2044213100/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=8+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a446/bed43eb/92c6ec4b/75fae108/2044213100/VEsP/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=9+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a446/bed43eb/92c6ec4b/75fae10b/2044213100/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=10+-+contributing+to+Our+Revolution+here&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190627_1_2").

name: alert@timryanforamerica.com
subject: what you missed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
**_" There's nothing worse than not being heard._**

_Nothing worse than not being seen. It 's time for us to come together.

I come from the middle of industrial America, but these problems are all over our country.

There's a tent city in LA, there are homeless people and people around our country who can't afford a home. It's time for us to get back on track._

**_I will only promise you one thing: when I walk into that Oval Office every morning, you will not be forgotten. Your voice will be heard. "_**

\- **Tim Ryan** at last night's presidential debate

**DO YOU AGREE?**

name: Peters, Gary

body:

| |
---
| | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda1/3eb3e2fc/441298a8/744af94f/655469203/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190626_em_fr_b4_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")
---

Last night, I spoke from the heart.

I shared my background -- from my grandmother immigrating to the U.S. from Mexico as a kid, to being raised by a single mom.

I didn't hold back -- I took on Trump's disastrous policies, from immigration to abortion.

I'm so humbled that my message resonated with America last night. **And today, I need a massive showing of support to show the strength of this movement and prove that we 're in this for the long haul.**

If I made you proud, your $15 would mean so much to me in this moment. Please rush in $15 before tonight's debates start at 9:

| [**Chip in $15 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda1/3eb3e2fc/441298a8/744af94e/655469203/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190626_em_fr_b4_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=15")

---

This morning, MSNBC's Joe Scarborough predicted voters could see me up on the big stage debating Trump.

That meant a lot to me.

[_**If you want me at the 3rd debate, rush in a gift to keep me in this race. I 'm counting on you before the next debates start in 3 hours. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda1/3eb3e2fc/441298a8/744af94f/655469203/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190626_em_fr_b4_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")

Thank you,

Julian

| | [](julianforthefuture.com)

---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda1/3eb3e2fc/441298a8/744af9b7/655469203/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda1/3eb3e2fc/441298a8/744af9b6/655469203/VEsHBw/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda1/3eb3e2fc/441298a8/744af9b5/655469203/VEsHBg/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: need to tell you something about the debates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
I'm really excited that the Democratic presidential debates are underway. It's really important that the whole country gets to hear directly from our candidates about their vision for our country's future and how they'll work to improve the lives of hardworking Americans.
I'm not yet sure who I'll be voting for, but I can tell you this: **a Democratic President can only be so effective without a Senate that supports her or him.**
Senate and Presidential candidates alike are facing a huge fundraising deadline on Sunday. Fundraising totals will be made public and Republican operatives, GOP strategists, and corporate special interests will all be able to see exactly how strong these Democratic campaigns are -- or aren't.
The deadline is just a few days away and we HAVE to make sure that Senate Democrats finish out strong. It's the only way we'll regain Senate control.
[**I 'd be so appreciative if you could please give $3 or however much you can to support Senate Democrats. With so much at stake, any amount would make a huge difference - especially today.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc21e/2a380d31/3e2af0ba/f13b9d/3856764654/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2gtNC1kc2NjIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA2MjdfbXdoNGRzY2NfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh-4-dscc?refcode=e20190627_mwh4dscc_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
We have some really fantastic Senate candidates running, everyone. MJ Hegar is ready to win in Texas, we've got great Democrats running in states like Iowa and North Carolina, and Mark Kelly is exactly the leader that Arizona needs.
Electing a Democratic President is important, but we must give them a Senate that will support their agenda too.
**The deadline is just a few days away, so this is getting urgent:[Please give $3 or as much as you can -- right now, today -- to help Democrats take back the Senate.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc21e/2a380d31/3e2af0ba/f13b9d/3856764654/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2gtNC1kc2NjIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA2MjdfbXdoNGRzY2NfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh-4-dscc?refcode=e20190627_mwh4dscc_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**
Thank you so much.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc21e/2a380d31/3e2af0ba/f13b9d/3856764654/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2gtNC1kc2NjIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA2MjdfbXdoNGRzY2NfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh-4-dscc?refcode=e20190627_mwh4dscc_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Under President Trump, America is respected again
body:
When world leaders sit down with President Trump over the next few days, they know they’re meeting with a negotiating partner who isn’t bluffing... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=44d3a5d9f6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 27, 2019
---
| | |
# **Under President Trump, America is respected again**

**President Donald J. Trump** left Washington yesterday for Osaka, Japan, the host city for this year’s G20 Summit. When world leaders sit down with President Trump over the next few days, they know they’re meeting with a negotiating partner who isn’t bluffing when he says he’ll take tough action to protect American workers.

**Free, fair, and reciprocal trade** deals are a key component of President Trump’s pro-jobs, pro-growth strategy. At the G20, U.S. officials will continue working with our allies to confront unfair trade practices that hollow out our working class—including intellectual property theft, unfair labor practices, and forced technology transfer abroad.

**On the way to Japan:** [President Trump stops in Alaska to thank our troops](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=21c954283b&e=3ee4985eea)

**After touching down** in Osaka, President Trump had dinner with Australian Prime Minister Scott Morrison. The two discussed several pressing, shared challenges, including North Korea and Iran. That meeting was the first of many for President Trump over the coming days, where trade and national security will be at the top of the agenda.

“**We are a country** that's respected again,” President Trump said before taking off for Japan. “They didn't respect us 3, 4, 5 years ago. They respect us again.”

**”Family photo”:** [President Trump and world leaders at last year’s G20](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d943ae0eb6&e=3ee4985eea)

**This week** is also an important opportunity to tell the story of America’s economic revival under President Trump. Our citizens prosper when the world economy is growing, ensuring strong and stable markets for American goods and services. Pro-growth policies, such as tax reform, have added millions of new jobs, brought our manufacturing sector back to life, and restored confidence in the U.S. economy.

**The world can follow** America’s lead. Countries can unlock their full economic potential by investing in training to reskill workers for high-demand industries. They can also benefit by fully empowering women to participate in their economies and governments—an effort the Trump Administration is helping to lead through Ivanka Trump’s Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative ([W-GDP](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=47b09a7c92&e=3ee4985eea)).

[President Trump is standing up for fair, reciprocal trade at this week’s G20.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1f24ee4ca5&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬 President Trump:** [“We’ve been very good to our allies.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6b301ff4bb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **President Donald J. Trump greets military personnel during a refueling stop at Joint Base Elmendorf in Anchorage, Alaska, on his way to the G20 Summit in Osaka, Japan** | June 26, 2019
---
|

name: Tina Smith
subject: Did you hear this last night on the debate stage?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190627_em-2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") friend,

Last night on the debate stage, we heard every presidential candidate agree: **We need 51 votes in the Senate to make any progress in Washington.** But if Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump get their way, they'll turn this seat red -- leaving Democrats with no chance of taking back the Senate. Why are McConnell and Trump so focused on Minnesota? Because Trump almost won here in 2016. Because they know a strong Republican majority in the Senate can continue attacking a woman's right to choose, our health care, and our environment. **And because they know control of the U.S. Senate allows them to define the future of the Supreme Court for decades to come.**

**[Our end-of-quarter deadline is just three days away, and there's no room for error here. In a race this critical, we can't afford to fall even a dollar short. I'm personally asking you to give as much as you can so we can close our $22,254 fundraising gap by Sunday. Will you chip in now?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. clean_body: | "=" friend, Last night on the debate stage, we heard every presidential candidate agree: We need 51 votes in the Senate to make any progress in Washington. But if Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump get their way, they'll turn this seat red -- leaving Democrats with no chance of taking back the Senate. Why are McConnell and Trump so focused on Minnesota? Because Trump almost won here in 2016. Because they know a strong Republican majority in the Senate can continue attacking a woman's right to choose, our health care, and our environment. And because they know control of the U.S. Senate allows them to define the future of the Supreme Court for decades to come. "=" This race could be the difference between Democrats taking back the Senate or falling short. Friend, thank you so much for standing with me. Tina | U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race NBC News has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back. ""

name: Khizr Khan
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
I'd walk barefoot to every swing-state if it meant Democrats would defeat Mitch McConnell's Senate and put a check on Trump's power.
---
| | I am a Gold Star father.

I was thrust into the spotlight when Donald Trump insulted me, my loving wife, and our fallen son.

And now, I've committed myself to doing everything possible to stop Donald Trump.

**I 'd walk barefoot to every swing-state if it meant Democrats would defeat Mitch McConnell's Senate and put a check on Trump's power. **But I can't do it alone. I need you with me.

The numbers show we simply can't defeat Mitch McConnell's Senate without a win in New Mexico. But Ben Ray is up against his very first end-of-quarter deadline -- and he still has a $12,908 gap to fill.

So I'm humbly asking: Will you rush in $15 to elect Ben Ray and defeat Mitch McConnell's Republican Senate?

name: Dick Durbin
subject: One of the most shameful chapters of our history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
With the crisis on our border growing by the day because of President Trump's inhumane immigration policies, we are experiencing one of the most shameful chapters of our history.
There is no way around it: President Trump and his Administration are directly responsible for the pain and suffering we're seeing on our southern border--and this cruelty must be stopped.
**[Sign the petition to join me in the fight against President Trump's anti-immigrant agenda.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c9a/42ab3cf4/63e3db06/135d69df/1540977902/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://action.dickdurbin.com/page/s/put-a-stop-to-the-presidents-cruel-agenda?source=em190627&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
While children and families are experiencing detestable conditions in detention facilities on the border, President Trump is simultaneously driving fear in cities like Chicago and communities around the country with his sinister threat of mass arrests and deportations of immigrants.
Sadly, none of this is a surprise. Just look at President Trump's record. From the day he announced his campaign, he has demonized immigrants. He has instituted a Muslim travel ban, revoked protections for Dreamers, and torn thousands of children away from their parents. None of this should be happening in our country. We must bring this embarrassing chapter to a close.
**[I'm fighting to put a stop to the President's cruel agenda. Sign on now if you're with me. ](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c9a/42ab3cf4/63e3db06/135d69df/1540977902/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://action.dickdurbin.com/page/s/put-a-stop-to-the-presidents-cruel-agenda?source=em190627&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Add My Name](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c9a/42ab3cf4/63e3db06/135d69df/1540977902/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://action.dickdurbin.com/page/s/put-a-stop-to-the-presidents-cruel-agenda?source=em190627&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I will fight for you as hard as I fight for my own family.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Here's the next step in our plan for big, structural change: We need as many people to own a piece of this fight as possible. The more grassroots donors who step up, the stronger our team is. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e3f0/45c30650/17828a69e/669a855b/4086800170/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
Never in a million years did I think I would stand on a presidential debate stage.

I was born and raised in Oklahoma. My three older brothers all joined the military, and I had a dream growing up -- to be a public school teacher.

But by the time I graduated from high school, my family didn't have money for a college application, let alone for tuition.

I got my chance at a $50-a-semester commuter college. That was a little slice of government that created some opportunity for a girl. And it opened my life.

**I am in this fight because we can make our government, our economy, and our country work not just for those at the top -- we can make it work for everyone.

And I promise you this: I will fight for you as hard as I fight for my own family.

Here's the next step in our plan for big, structural change: We need as many people to own a piece of this fight as possible. The more grassroots donors who step up, the stronger our team is.

Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for being on this team -- will you make your first contribution today?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically processed:_
